query: SELECT id, originalName, status, pipelineStatus, pipelineError, pipelineStartedAt, pipelineFinishedAt, rowCount, colCount, fileSizeKb, createdAt FROM sessions WHERE originalName LIKE '%舒络%' OR originalName LIKE '%shu%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user UpQ6nzGwi5FMPrH.root --database CRyFQH5qGudysyWQuRqoNj --execute SELECT id, originalName, status, pipelineStatus, pipelineError, pipelineStartedAt, pipelineFinishedAt, rowCount, colCount, fileSizeKb, createdAt FROM sessions WHERE originalName LIKE '%舒络%' OR originalName LIKE '%shu%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
